case_title: HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION vs. AMISTOSO, MARIVIC A. et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT AMISTOSO, MARIVIC A. AMISTOSO, MICHAEL A. DOES I THROUGH V SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-28-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-27-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-08-1995

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMISTOSO, MARIVIC A. AMISTOSO, MICHAEL A. $3,309.27 PRINCIPAL, $3,781.57 INTEREST, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,235.84, INTEREST TO ACCRUE ON TOTAL JUDGMENT AT 10% PER ANNUM FROM AND AFTER 1/25/95. DEFT TO PAY NOT LESS THAN $150.00 PER MONTH ON OR BEFORE 1/25/95 AND EVERY MONTH AFTER TILL BALANCE PAID FULLY. STAY ENFORCEMENT OF JUDGMENT IF PAYMENT IS TIMELY. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR OTHER DETAILS. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT AMISTOSO, MARIVIC A. AMISTOSO, MICHAEL A.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION SERVED DEC-05-1994, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AMISTOSO, MARIVIC A. AMISTOSO, MICHAEL A.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION
